name: QUAID GIGASLOPE
description: Quad multimode modulator. Four slopes run as envelope, looping LFO or step sequencer with 13 stages, per-stage level/time/curve, quantiser, EOC/EOS triggers and AXON CV expansion.

controls.name: Slope
controls.description: Selects which of the four slopes is being edited.

controls.name: Type
controls.description: Switches the selected slope between Env, Loop and Step.

controls.name: Start / End
controls.description: Sets the active stage range for the selected slope.

controls.name: Sustain
controls.description: Selects the sustain stage for Env-style operation.

controls.name: Quantiser
controls.description: Cycles the selected slope through internal musical scales.
Sets the selected slope output range.

controls.name: Stage Level / Time / Curve
controls.description: Each stage has a dedicated level slider, time knob and curve control.

controls.name: CV Assign
controls.description: Assigns each CV input to a slope parameter.

inputs.name: Trigger Input 1-4
inputs.description: Trigger or gate inputs for the four slopes; each can drive a separate contour.

outputs.name: Slope Output 1-4
outputs.description: The main CV outputs for the four slopes.

outputs.name: Trigger Output 1-4
outputs.description: Assignable EOC or EOS trigger outputs.

behaviors.name: Three slope modes
behaviors.description: Env outputs a triggered multi-stage contour, Loop free-runs as a custom LFO and Step turns the same stage editor into a sequencer.

behaviors.name: Shared or split stages
behaviors.description: The 13 stages can be shared across all slopes or split into overlapping ranges, so one module can act like several related generators.

behaviors.name: Stage-based retriggering
behaviors.trigger: patch stage outputs into Trigger Input or CV assignment
behaviors.description: Stage timing can be driven by its own gate outputs, which makes ratcheting, conditional sustain and self-reset loops practical.

behaviors.name: Quantised slope output
behaviors.description: The slope output can quantise to 19 scales, turning the modulator into a usable pitch sequencer rather than only a contour source.

behaviors.name: Range switching
behaviors.description: The output can live in bipolar, unipolar or half-range modes, which makes it easy to drive either audio-rate FM or unipolar VCA/filter duties.

behaviors.name: AXON expansion
behaviors.description: The expander adds four more CV inputs for denser stage control without changing the main panel workflow.

patchIdeas.name: Four-stage envelope bank
patchIdeas.patch: Slope 1-4 each run as their own Env contour into four VCAs. One gate from the keyboard can trigger all four by normalising the trigger input chain, giving a compact polyphonic envelope bank.
patchIdeas.diagram:
QUAID GIGASLOPE:
* Slope: 1
* Type: Env
* Start: Stage 1
* End: Stage 4
* Output range: 0-5V

VCA 1:
VCA 2:
VCA 3:
VCA 4:
VCO 1:
VCO 2:
VCO 3:
VCO 4:

- Keyboard (Gate) g> QUAID GIGASLOPE (Trigger Input 1)
- QUAID GIGASLOPE (Slope Output 1) >> VCA 1 (CV)
- QUAID GIGASLOPE (Slope Output 2) >> VCA 2 (CV)
- QUAID GIGASLOPE (Slope Output 3) >> VCA 3 (CV)
- QUAID GIGASLOPE (Slope Output 4) >> VCA 4 (CV)
- VCO 1 (Out) -> VCA 1 (In)
- VCO 2 (Out) -> VCA 2 (In)
- VCO 3 (Out) -> VCA 3 (In)
- VCO 4 (Out) -> VCA 4 (In)
- VCA 1 (Out) -> Mixer (In 1)
- VCA 2 (Out) -> Mixer (In 2)
- VCA 3 (Out) -> Mixer (In 3)
- VCA 4 (Out) -> Mixer (In 4)

patchIdeas.name: Looping animated LFO
patchIdeas.patch: Slope 2 in Loop mode with a short stage span and alternating curves. The output becomes a custom modulation source that can sweep filter cutoff while Trigger Output 2 marks the loop boundary.
patchIdeas.diagram:
QUAID GIGASLOPE:
* Slope: 2
* Type: Loop
* Start: Stage 2
* End: Stage 6

LFO:
VCO:
Filter:
VCA:

- Clock (Out) c> QUAID GIGASLOPE (Trigger Input 2)
- QUAID GIGASLOPE (Slope Output 2) >> Filter (Cutoff)
- QUAID GIGASLOPE (Trigger Output 2) t> Envelope (Trig)
- VCO (Out) -> Filter (In) -> VCA (In)
- Envelope (Out) >> VCA (CV)
- VCA (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Quantised step melody
patchIdeas.patch: Slope 3 in Step mode, quantiser on, and a short 5-stage range. The stage levels become a melodic pattern while Trigger Output 3 can re-fire an envelope on each new step.
patchIdeas.diagram:
QUAID GIGASLOPE:
* Slope: 3
* Type: Step
* Quantiser: on
* Start: Stage 1
* End: Stage 5

Quantizer:
VCO:
Envelope:
VCA:

- Clock (Out) c> QUAID GIGASLOPE (Trigger Input 3)
- QUAID GIGASLOPE (Slope Output 3) >> Quantizer (In)
- Quantizer (Out) p> VCO (V/Oct)
- QUAID GIGASLOPE (Trigger Output 3) t> Envelope (Trig)
- Envelope (Out) >> VCA (CV)
- VCO (Out) -> VCA (In)
- VCA (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Self-reset stage loop
patchIdeas.patch: Stage 4's trigger output feeds Enable and Sustain so the contour pauses on itself until a later gate breaks the loop. This turns the stage editor into a controlled feedback network.
patchIdeas.diagram:
QUAID GIGASLOPE:
* Slope: 4
* Type: Env
* Start: Stage 1
* End: Stage 8

Envelope:
VCO:
VCA:
Filter:

- Clock (Out) c> QUAID GIGASLOPE (Trigger Input 4)
- QUAID GIGASLOPE (Trigger Output 4) g> QUAID GIGASLOPE (Enable)
- QUAID GIGASLOPE (Trigger Output 4) g> QUAID GIGASLOPE (Sustain)
- QUAID GIGASLOPE (Slope Output 4) >> VCA (CV)
- QUAID GIGASLOPE (Slope Output 4) >> Filter (Cutoff)
- VCO (Out) -> Filter (In) -> VCA (In)
- VCA (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Stage address performance
patchIdeas.patch: CV 1 is assigned to stage time and CV 2 to stage level, giving hand-played control over the contour while an LFO drives Trigger Input 1. The same panel gesture can morph the patch from drone to sequence without repatching.
patchIdeas.diagram:
QUAID GIGASLOPE:
* Slope: 1
* Type: Loop
* CV 1: Stage Time
* CV 2: Stage Level

LFO:
Mixer:
Filter:

- LFO (Out) >> QUAID GIGASLOPE (CV Input 1)
- Mixer (Out) >> QUAID GIGASLOPE (CV Input 2)
- Clock (Out) c> QUAID GIGASLOPE (Trigger Input 1)
- QUAID GIGASLOPE (Slope Output 1) >> Filter (Cutoff)
- QUAID GIGASLOPE (Slope Output 1) >> VCA (CV)
